title: Unforgettable celebration of women and music
description: ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - The Garden Route Mall...
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - The Garden Route Mall Ladies Club event on Friday 30 May was nothing short of magical.


> "We had the immense pleasure of hosting the phenomenal Juanita du Plessis, whose performance captivated an audience of 120 incredible women.


"From the moment the show began, the energy in the room was electric. It was a true celebration of womanhood, connection and joy," says Tumi Masango, the mall marketing manager.

The evening was filled with music, laughter and memorable moments. Each guest was treated to a beautifully curated goodie bag, and amazing prizes were given away throughout the event, all made possible through the generous support of sponsors.

More than 50 brands partnered with the mall to make this night a success, contributing to a remarkable R900 000 in sponsorships.

"We are deeply grateful to every brand that supported our vision and helped us spoil our guests in style," said Masango.


> The celebration continued on Saturday, where the magic was spread to a wider audience with a vibrant three-hour music showcase featuring Juanita du Plessis once again, joined by the talented Shaza, and the dynamic duo Thelma & Jovan.


Shoppers were treated to live music and great vibes for a fun-filled morning that turned an ordinary shopping day into something truly special.

The next Ladies Club event will take place in November, alongside another Saturday Family Show."To our artists, sponsors, partners, and every guest who joined us - thank you. You helped us create something truly unforgettable. We cannot wait to welcome you again," said Masango.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
